title: Mixed Energy Systems Medley
description: Touch all energy systems in ascending order
purpose: Touch all energy systems in one session

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 13:36 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 13:36. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 13:36 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. 65 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 17% complete. 45 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 45 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 17% done. 45 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 17% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 13 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 42% done. 4 intervals left. 35 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 2 of 6. Target: 85% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 4 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 85%, 85-100 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 42% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 42% into session. 85%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 3/6. 44 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 55% complete. Rep 3/6. 92% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 44 minutes of work done. 24 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 3/6. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 3/6. 92% FTP × 10:24. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/1. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 2 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/1. 68% complete. Hold 100% steady. 18 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 18 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 54 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/1.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 76% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5: 115% FTP. You're 60 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 14 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 76% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 1 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/6. 115% FTP × 4:00. Seated. 1 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 150% for 48s. Then 13min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 150% × 48s. Then 13min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 48s at 150%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 150% for 48s. Then 13min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 150% × 48s. Seated, 95-110 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 82% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 52min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 65 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 50% FTP × 13:36. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
